data.department: Food Production, Food and Beverage Service, Kitchen Stewarding

observations.location: Food Production, Food and Beverage Service, Kitchen Stewarding
observations.questionText: Is the utility sink in good condition?

observations.location: Food Production, Food and Beverage Service, Kitchen Stewarding
observations.questionText: Is the utility sink in good condition?

data.title: Internal audit checklist

observations.questionText: Is the utility sink in good condition?
Are the food storage bins/containers in good condition?
Are the food cooking and reheating equipment in good condition?
Is the food pickup counter / plate warmer / buffet counter in good condition?
Is the dough mixer and dough sheeter in good condition?
Are the dry storage cabinets/racks/shelves in good condition?
Is the food holding and serving equipment in good condition?
Are the working tables / bar counters in good condition?
Are the cleaning equipment in good condition?
Are the electrical panels/DB, cables and switchboards in good condition?
Is adequate lighting maintained, with all lights in working condition and all light fixtures and glass panels properly covered or protected??
Are the utility lines in good condition and free from leakage?
Is the  HVAC system (ducts, fresh air grills and exhaust fans) in good working condition?
Is an air curtain installed at the exterior opening and maintained in good working condition?
Is the floor in good condition?
Are the walls in good condition?
Is the ceiling in good condition?
Are the doors in good condition?
Are the windows and skylights in good condition?
Are the signages/stickers in good condition?
Is the hand wash station in good condition?
Are the drains in good condition and free from blockage?
Is the insect light trap in good working condition?
Is preventive maintenance of equipment's schedule available & followed?
Is preventive maintenance of facility schedule available & followed?
Are all measuring equipment's calibrated by an NABL approved lab?
Are all disposable food contact materials (e.g., cling wrap, aluminum foil, wiping cloths, paper rolls, takeaway containers, etc.) stored hygienically and protected from contamination?
Is shelf life poster clearly visible?
Are storage containers or packets stored off floor, wall, ceiling in dry store?
Are food and non food items are stored seperately to avoid cross contamination?
Are storage containers or packets covered and labelled properly? FIFO followed?
Are all glass containers and cans in food handling and storage areas minimized and managed to lower the risk of breakage and contamination?
Are vegetarian and non-vegetarian foods properly segregated during strage
Are dry storage mise en place trays clean, labeled, and properly segregated?
Is it ensured that no materials are stored under the sink?
Are dry storage food opened from original packaging has secondary shelf life label?
Are dry storage  products consumed within the recommended shelf life?

Are all dry food storage equipment and containers (single-use or reusable) clean and properly maintained, and is reuse of pre-packaged food containers or unapproved containers avoided (e.g., storage racks, shelving units, ingredient bins, SS containers, food-grade plastic containers, storage crates, ingredient tubs, etc.)?
Is de-boxing practiced to ensure outer supplier cartons are not brought into the food production area?
Are chiller units maintained neat, clean & tidy?
Are chiller units well maintained without any damages?
Is food temperature inside chiller within prescribed limits?
Are food items in chiller organized in the proper order as outlined in the policy?
Are chilled food items covered,  and FIFO followed?
Are all chilled foods stored in clean, sanitized, food-grade containers (e.g., plastic, stainless steel, crates)?
Are Chiller records maintained as per the policy?
Are freezer units maintained neat, clean & tidy?
Are freezer units well maintained without any damages?
Is food temperature inside freezer within prescribed limits?
Are food items in Freezer organized in the proper order as outlined in the policy?
Are frozen food items covered,  and FIFO followed?
Are all frozen foods stored in clean, sanitized, food-grade containers (e.g., plastic, stainless steel, crates)?
Are Freezer records maintained as per the policy?
Are all food items stored in chiller labeled?
Are all food items stored in freezer labeled?
Are frozen food opened from original packaging has secondary shelf life label?
Are chilled food opened from original packaging has secondary shelf life label?
Are frozen  products consumed within the recommended shelf life?
Are chilled products consumed within the recommended shelf life?
Is FSSAI license displayed in the premises?
Are Food Safety Display Boards easily visible in each F&B outlet?
Is adequate facility available for fruits and vegetables washing? 2 sinks available or other equivalent design?
Is  fruits and vegetables washing process followed in a correct manner?
Are all fruits and vegetables used as raw ready to eat foods (including garnish) washed and sanitized prior to use?
Are sanitized and unsanitized fruits & vegetables handled/stored separately to prevent cross contamination?
Are fruits and vegetables washing records maintained as per the policy?
Are pasteurized eggs used, whenever required? Are eggs stored in chiller?
Is thawing performed in a correct manner?
Are all thawing equipment and surfaces (e.g., double tray, thawing cabinet, chilled water supply, refrigerator, thawing sink, rack, table, etc.) properly cleaned?
Is running water 15 deg C less used for emergency thawing?
Are food items being thawed labeled properly? Is proper secondary shelf life of thawed product followed?
Are Thawing records maintained as per the policy?
Is separate cooking equipment (oven, oil, skewers, etc.) used for vegetarian and non-vegetarian food preparation
Is food reheated at recommended minimum core temperature?
Is reheating temperature chart displayed in the kitchen?
Are reheating records maintained as per the policy?
Is food cooked at recommended minimum core temperature?
Is intermediate holding process followed properly?
Is there a risk of contamination/ cross-contamination during storage/preperation/service of food?
Are cooking records maintained as per the policy?
Is the food sample retention process, sample quantity implemented and maintained as per prescribed guidelines??
Are adequate food cooling facilities (e.g., blast chillers or ice-bath cooling) available, and are the associated equipment and utensils clean and properly maintained?
Is cooling performed in a correct manner?
Are cooling records maintained as per the policy?
Are holding temperatures maintained as per the requirement?
Is cooking oil filtered and monitored regularly?
Is oil to be discarded provided to an authorized collection agency? Is it stored appropriately before discarding?
Are cooking oil records maintained as per the policy?
Are work spaces clearly identified for preparing allergen free food?
Are allergen ingredients properly identified, segregated, and stored separately in sealed containers to prevent contamination?
Are thermometers daily calibrated by prescribed method and in working condition? Are alcohol wipes available for sanitization?
Are food thermometer records maintained as per the policy?

Are all food storage equipment and containers clean and properly maintained, and are only approved food-grade containers used for storage (e.g., storage racks, shelving units, ingredient bins, SS containers, food-grade plastic containers, storage crates, ingredient tubs, etc.)?
Are closed, paddle operated waste bins with liner inside used?
Is waste segregation in place?
Is color coding of chopping boards & knives followed as per the policy?
Are chopping boards & knives maintained in good state of repair?
Are chopping boards & knives sanitized stored and handled in a correct manner?
Are color coding posters clearly visible?
Is it ensured that no equipment is left on the cutting board during processing?
Is the floor clean?
Are the walls clean?
Is the ceiling clean?
Are the doors clean?
Are the windows and skylights clean?
Are the signages/stickers clean?
Is the hand wash station clean?
Are the drains clean?
Is the insect light trap clean?
Are all food contact items or surfaces sanitized properly including storage crates ?
Is the utility sink clean?
Are the food storage bins/containers clean?

Are all cooking appliances (e.g., Baking Oven, Combi Oven, Cooking range / gas range, Tandoor, Griller / char grill, Deep fryer, Microwave oven, Combi oven, Salamander, Induction stove, Tilting pan / bratt pan, Steam kettle, Rice cooker) maintained in a clean condition?
Is the food pickup counter / plate warmer / buffet counter clean?

Are all food processing equipmen clean and properly maintained? (e.g.,Wet grinder, Mixer grinder, Pulverizer, Potato peeler machine, Vegetable cutter/vegetable chopper, Meat mincer/meat grinder, Dough kneader, Dough sheeter, Food processor, Vegetable slicer, Cheese grater machine, Coconut scraper machine, Bone saw machine, Planetary mixer, Blender/juice blender etc)

Are all kitchen utensils clean, properly maintained, and stored hygienically (e.g.,grilling or tandoor utensils,  rolling pin/roller pan, gas lighter, ladles,tin opener, tongs, spatulas/turners, whisks, skimmers, serving spoons,, peelers, scoops, dough cutters, measuring spoons and cups, scrapers, oil brushes, pizza cutters, etc.)
Are all CGS (China, Glassware, and Silverware) clean, free from chips or cracks, and stored hygienically?
Are all  food transport trolleys/Non food transported and insulated boxes clearly identified, clean, and properly maintained?
Are all food contact preparation surfaces, such as working tables and bar counters, clean and properly maintained?
Is the water cooler clean?
is the ice machine clean?
Is the coffee machine clean?

Are all cleaning and sanitization equipment clean, properly maintained, and are only approved equipment used (e.g., sanitizer tanks, cleaning brushes, scrubbing pads, wiping cloths, chemical spray bottles, etc.)?
Are the electrical panels/DB, cables and switchboards clean?
Are the lights clean?
Are the utility lines (gas, water, steam etc.) clean?
Is the HVAC system (ducts, fresh air grills and exhaust fans) clean?
Is the air curtain clean?
Are chemicals handled and transported in properly labeled containers and kept closed when not in use to prevent leakage or contamination?
Are pests and/or signs of pests visible in the premises?
Are UV fly catchers clean (free from excessive dead insects), sited correctly, used continuously and maintained in a good working condition?
Is hand wash policy followed properly?
Is glove policy followed properly?
Is clean and standard uniform followed properly?
Is jewellery policy followed properly?
Is sanitizer & hair net dispenser correctly installed at entry point of the food handling area?
Is there a designated area for food handlers to hang their aprons during breaks?
Is personal hygiene followed properly?
Are food handler's medical tests conducted as per the requirement?

Is the hand wash station in good condition?
Are the drains in good condition and free from blockage?
Is the insect light trap in good working condition?
Is preventive maintenance of equipment's schedule available & followed?
Is preventive maintenance of facility schedule available & followed?
Are all measuring equipment's calibrated by an NABL approved lab?
Are all disposable food contact materials (e.g., cling wrap, aluminum foil, wiping cloths, paper rolls, takeaway containers, etc.) stored hygienically and protected from contamination?
Is shelf life poster clearly visible?
Are storage containers or packets stored off floor, wall, ceiling in dry store?
Are food and non food items are stored seperately to avoid cross contamination?
Are storage containers or packets covered and labelled properly? FIFO followed?
Are all glass containers and cans in food handling and storage areas minimized and managed to lower the risk of breakage and contamination?
Are vegetarian and non-vegetarian foods properly segregated during strage
Are dry storage mise en place trays clean, labeled, and properly segregated?
Is it ensured that no materials are stored under the sink?
Are dry storage food opened from original packaging has secondary shelf life label?
Are dry storage  products consumed within the recommended shelf life?

Are all dry food storage equipment and containers (single-use or reusable) clean and properly maintained, and is reuse of pre-packaged food containers or unapproved containers avoided (e.g., storage racks, shelving units, ingredient bins, SS containers, food-grade plastic containers, storage crates, ingredient tubs, etc.)?
Is de-boxing practiced to ensure outer supplier cartons are not brought into the food production area?
Are chiller units maintained neat, clean & tidy?
Are chiller units well maintained without any damages?
Is food temperature inside chiller within prescribed limits?
Are food items in chiller organized in the proper order as outlined in the policy?
Are chilled food items covered,  and FIFO followed?
Are all chilled foods stored in clean, sanitized, food-grade containers (e.g., plastic, stainless steel, crates)?
Are Chiller records maintained as per the policy?
Are freezer units maintained neat, clean & tidy?
Are freezer units well maintained without any damages?
Is food temperature inside freezer within prescribed limits?
Are food items in Freezer organized in the proper order as outlined in the policy?
Are frozen food items covered,  and FIFO followed?
Are all frozen foods stored in clean, sanitized, food-grade containers (e.g., plastic, stainless steel, crates)?
Are Freezer records maintained as per the policy?
Are all food items stored in chiller labeled?
Are all food items stored in freezer labeled?
Are frozen food opened from original packaging has secondary shelf life label?
Are chilled food opened from original packaging has secondary shelf life label?
Are frozen  products consumed within the recommended shelf life?
Are chilled products consumed within the recommended shelf life?
Is FSSAI license displayed in the premises?
Are Food Safety Display Boards easily visible in each F&B outlet?
Is adequate facility available for fruits and vegetables washing? 2 sinks available or other equivalent design?
Is  fruits and vegetables washing process followed in a correct manner?
Are all fruits and vegetables used as raw ready to eat foods (including garnish) washed and sanitized prior to use?
Are sanitized and unsanitized fruits & vegetables handled/stored separately to prevent cross contamination?
Are fruits and vegetables washing records maintained as per the policy?
Are pasteurized eggs used, whenever required? Are eggs stored in chiller?
Is thawing performed in a correct manner?
Are all thawing equipment and surfaces (e.g., double tray, thawing cabinet, chilled water supply, refrigerator, thawing sink, rack, table, etc.) properly cleaned?
Is running water 15 deg C less used for emergency thawing?
Are food items being thawed labeled properly? Is proper secondary shelf life of thawed product followed?
Are Thawing records maintained as per the policy?
Is separate cooking equipment (oven, oil, skewers, etc.) used for vegetarian and non-vegetarian food preparation
Is food reheated at recommended minimum core temperature?
Is reheating temperature chart displayed in the kitchen?
Are reheating records maintained as per the policy?
Is food cooked at recommended minimum core temperature?
Is intermediate holding process followed properly?
Is there a risk of contamination/ cross-contamination during storage/preperation/service of food?
Are cooking records maintained as per the policy?
Is the food sample retention process, sample quantity implemented and maintained as per prescribed guidelines??
Are adequate food cooling facilities (e.g., blast chillers or ice-bath cooling) available, and are the associated equipment and utensils clean and properly maintained?
Is cooling performed in a correct manner?
Are cooling records maintained as per the policy?
Are holding temperatures maintained as per the requirement?
Is cooking oil filtered and monitored regularly?
Is oil to be discarded provided to an authorized collection agency? Is it stored appropriately before discarding?
Are cooking oil records maintained as per the policy?
Are work spaces clearly identified for preparing allergen free food?
Are allergen ingredients properly identified, segregated, and stored separately in sealed containers to prevent contamination?
Are thermometers daily calibrated by prescribed method and in working condition? Are alcohol wipes available for sanitization?
Are food thermometer records maintained as per the policy?

Are all food storage equipment and containers clean and properly maintained, and are only approved food-grade containers used for storage (e.g., storage racks, shelving units, ingredient bins, SS containers, food-grade plastic containers, storage crates, ingredient tubs, etc.)?
Are closed, paddle operated waste bins with liner inside used?
Is waste segregation in place?
Is color coding of chopping boards & knives followed as per the policy?
Are chopping boards & knives maintained in good state of repair?
Are chopping boards & knives sanitized stored and handled in a correct manner?
Are color coding posters clearly visible?
Is it ensured that no equipment is left on the cutting board during processing?
Is the floor clean?
Are the walls clean?
Is the ceiling clean?
Are the doors clean?
Are the windows and skylights clean?
Are the signages/stickers clean?
Is the hand wash station clean?
Are the drains clean?
Is the insect light trap clean?
Are all food contact items or surfaces sanitized properly including storage crates ?
Is the utility sink clean?
Are the food storage bins/containers clean?

Are all cooking appliances (e.g., Baking Oven, Combi Oven, Cooking range / gas range, Tandoor, Griller / char grill, Deep fryer, Microwave oven, Combi oven, Salamander, Induction stove, Tilting pan / bratt pan, Steam kettle, Rice cooker) maintained in a clean condition?
Is the food pickup counter / plate warmer / buffet counter clean?

Are all food processing equipmen clean and properly maintained? (e.g.,Wet grinder, Mixer grinder, Pulverizer, Potato peeler machine, Vegetable cutter/vegetable chopper, Meat mincer/meat grinder, Dough kneader, Dough sheeter, Food processor, Vegetable slicer, Cheese grater machine, Coconut scraper machine, Bone saw machine, Planetary mixer, Blender/juice blender etc)

Are all kitchen utensils clean, properly maintained, and stored hygienically (e.g.,grilling or tandoor utensils,  rolling pin/roller pan, gas lighter, ladles,tin opener, tongs, spatulas/turners, whisks, skimmers, serving spoons,, peelers, scoops, dough cutters, measuring spoons and cups, scrapers, oil brushes, pizza cutters, etc.)
Are all CGS (China, Glassware, and Silverware) clean, free from chips or cracks, and stored hygienically?
Are all  food transport trolleys/Non food transported and insulated boxes clearly identified, clean, and properly maintained?
Are all food contact preparation surfaces, such as working tables and bar counters, clean and properly maintained?
Is the water cooler clean?
is the ice machine clean?
Is the coffee machine clean?

Are all cleaning and sanitization equipment clean, properly maintained, and are only approved equipment used (e.g., sanitizer tanks, cleaning brushes, scrubbing pads, wiping cloths, chemical spray bottles, etc.)?
Are the electrical panels/DB, cables and switchboards clean?
Are the lights clean?
Are the utility lines (gas, water, steam etc.) clean?
Is the HVAC system (ducts, fresh air grills and exhaust fans) clean?
Is the air curtain clean?
Are chemicals handled and transported in properly labeled containers and kept closed when not in use to prevent leakage or contamination?
Are pests and/or signs of pests visible in the premises?
Are UV fly catchers clean (free from excessive dead insects), sited correctly, used continuously and maintained in a good working condition?
Is hand wash policy followed properly?
Is glove policy followed properly?
Is clean and standard uniform followed properly?
Is jewellery policy followed properly?
Is sanitizer & hair net dispenser correctly installed at entry point of the food handling area?
Is there a designated area for food handlers to hang their aprons during breaks?
Is personal hygiene followed properly?
Are food handler's medical tests conducted as per the requirement?
